text.title: Bundle vs Split Tools Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure from inventory to validated bundle/split decision.

step.name: count-and-baseline
step.action: Count total tools; compute per-tool selection error from traces.
step.decision-gate: If count < 20 and error_rate < 5%, return action=no-action.

step.name: cluster
step.action: Group tools by shared audience AND shared argument shape; minimum group size 3.

step.name: propose-bundle
step.action: For each group, propose bundle_name + enum modes + per-mode descriptions (with "do NOT use" lines).

step.name: eval-before-after
step.action: Run eval on both; compute quality delta.
step.decision-gate: If delta < -0.02 (2% drop), reject bundle; mark refactor or revert.

step.name: emit-decision
step.action: Compose decision record; run scripts/validate-output.py; ship behind a feature flag.
